title: RecipeBookMassCraft-Revamped
description: Adds the ability to use the built in recipe book for selecting mass crafting recipes in ItemScroller
body:
#This is an updated version of the mod for 1.21, which was originally by CassieNya

![Adds the ability to use the built in recipe book for selecting mass crafting recipes in ItemScroller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/779fad0ca67a7b9d2317ed1149d0721750b1ae21.png)

Adds the ability to use the built in recipe book for selecting mass crafting recipes in ItemScroller

## Showcase: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/knCwAO8R2G4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Dependencies:
Needs [ItemScroller](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-scroller?version=1.21&loader=fabric), [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib?version=1.21&loader=fabric), and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api?version=1.21)

## Usage:
Click a recipe, press and hold the key combo bound to recipeBookMassCraft, which is **ctrl+q** by default

To change the key combo, press **I+C**, click Hotkeys and search for recipeBookMassCraft

### Note about this mod:
boyenn#3717 made this thing, released it as a dev build in a few discord servers, but never worked on it further.

This mod is 100% based on boyenn#3717's port, with the intermediary mappings translated to 1.19 Yarn mappings.

I worked and updated this mod for 1.21 as it was unlicensed
